title: Should I Choose VoIP or PBX?
description: Compare cloud VoIP and PBX-style systems for common small business needs.
quickAnswer: Cloud VoIP is usually simpler for distributed teams, while PBX-style systems can fit organizations that need more control over on-premise hardware or specialized call flows.
bestFor: Companies balancing control and ease of management
notBestFor: Teams that already chose a provider
Businesses with no internet reliability concerns

faqs.question: Can PBX systems be cloud-hosted?
faqs.answer: Yes. Some vendors offer hosted PBX-style services, so compare exact capabilities rather than labels alone.
